title: Dinner Cruise with Acute

description: Cruise beneath the glittering Dubai skyline, indulge in a world-class international buffet with live cooking stations, and sip unlimited drinks as the city lights dance on the water. This is the unforgettable experience awaiting you on this vibrant dinner cruise.
includes: International buffet with live cooking, BBQ, canapés, Asian & Western cuisine, salads, and desserts.
Soft drinks, alcoholic beverages and premium drinks (depending on the package selected).
Cruise along the Dubai Marina with views of Ain Dubai, JBR, Bluewater's Island, Palm Jumeirah, and Atlantis* (*subject to weather conditions).

title: Private Yacht Party
meta: Discover the Ultimate Intimate exclusive Yacth Party Experience Celebrating a special occasion, birthday party, co-operate gathering, wedding, or just seek...
description:
Discover the Ultimate Intimate exclusive Yacth Party Experience Celebrating a special occasion, birthday party, co-operate gathering, wedding, or just seeking and exclusive private experience.Pick a day of your choice and we will make it night for an unforgettable evening of socializing, networking, and connection in the heart of Dubai Marina. 
Whether you're new in town or just looking to expand your circle, we offer a unique mix of relaxed vibes, scenic backdrops, and great company. Make your nights special in one of the most iconic locations in Dubai.
Package can be upgraded as per your requirements from standard to a more premium as well as VIP experience for your well esteemed guests.
- Ideal for solo travelers, expats, and locals- Breathtaking views of the Dubai Marina skyline- The perfect nightlife experience to connect and unwind
 
Book Now

title: Ski Dubai Classic Pass
meta: Ski Dubai is an indoor ski resort with 22,500 square meters of indoor ski area. The park maintains a temperature of −1 to 2 °C throughout the year. It...
description:
Ski Dubai is an indoor ski resort with 22,500 square meters of indoor ski area. The park maintains a temperature of −1 to 2 °C throughout the year. It is a part of the Mall of the Emirates, one of the largest shopping malls in the world, located in Dubai.
Ski Dubai will retreat you from the blazing heat of Dubai and allow you to experience the snowy wonderland in the middle of the desert city. So get ready to feel the winter thrill and chills in the Middle East's first indoor ski resort with your Ski Dubai tickets.
The largest of its kind Ski Dubai imitates a snow-laden hill station; make the most of the Ski Dubai tickets offers to explore this indoor attraction with an 85-meter-high indoor mountain with slopes, a full-fledged snow park, a ski school, snow penguins, winter-themed cafes, and many polar activities. One of the best things to do in Ski Dubai is to hit the slopes and ski. Depending on your skills, you can choose from five different runs with varying lengths and difficulties.

title: Wild Wadi Water Park
meta: Located adjacent to Burj Al Arab in Jumeirah – one of the city’s most posh areas, a tour of the Wild Wadi Park will provide you with a delightful br...
description:
Located adjacent to Burj Al Arab in Jumeirah – one of the city’s most posh areas, a tour of the Wild Wadi Park will provide you with a delightful break from the daily hustles and bustles of your hectic life. 
The real highlight of the park is that it is built around the concept of an interesting Arabian folklore whose central characters are Juha and his seafaring friend, Sinbad. Its attention to detail and emphasis on character structure and development has won the park the World Waterpark Association Industry Innovation Awards for Outstanding Accomplishment Design and Theming. 
As you enter here, the child in you will pop out, with more than 25 exciting rides – the significant being Master Blaster or uphill water roller coaster, Ring Rides that allows you to choose from the single or double ring, Jumeirah Sceirah – a free-fall water slide that stands up to a height of 33 meters, Wipeout and Riptide rides with the capability of producing a realistic wave effect and Breakers Bay – the largest of its kind in the Middle East.
includes: Enjoy unlimited access to all the water rides, slides, and attractions available within the park.
Access to facilities like changing rooms, showers, and locker rentals.
Life jackets are provided free of charge at various locations within the park.

title: Atlantis Aquaventure Park
meta: A visit to Atlantis Aquaventure in the heart of the imposing Atlantis, The Palm Resort promises you experiences beyond any waterpark you’ve ever been to....
description:
A visit to Atlantis Aquaventure in the heart of the imposing Atlantis, The Palm Resort promises you experiences beyond any waterpark you’ve ever been to. From heart-racing slides to the lazy river and private beach relaxations, this premier water park in Dubai has everything to make your holiday both thrilling and memorable. Experience a mix of super daring, milder and kid-exclusive rides, slides and attractions within the water park. The water park’s daredevil experiences take form of Leap of Faith, Master Blast and Poseidon’s Revenge.
Slide into a pool of fun and meet the magical creatures of the sea. Get your pulse racing on any of the 105 slides and attractions or kick back on the beautiful private beach at, Atlantis Aquaventure, the largest waterpark in the Middle East & Europe.
includes: Enjoy unlimited access to Aquaventure Water Park
Get unlimited access to Adventure Beach

title: IMG Worlds Of Adventure
meta: IMG Worlds of Adventure is one of Dubai's best theme parks, bringing Marvel and Cartoon Network characters to life with state-of-the-art rides.. The park i...
description:
IMG Worlds of Adventure is one of Dubai's best theme parks, bringing Marvel and Cartoon Network characters to life with state-of-the-art rides.. The park is divided into six zones or 'worlds'. Two of the six worlds represent global brands such as Cartoon Network and Marvel, while the IMG Boulevard, Lost Valley, Haunted Town and IMG Kid Zone are created by the IMG Group. The park is the second-largest theme park in a temperature-controlled environment worldwide.
Indulge in its compelling blend of amazing rides, games, and several other highlights, making it ideal for families and individuals of all abilities and interests. Your IMG World tickets offer access to its four unique zones, including Marvel, Lost Valley, Cartoon Network, IMG Boulevard, and the newest IMG Kids Zone, each with its own distinct attractions and dining options.
includes: Gain entry to one of the world’s biggest indoor theme parks
Unlimited access to its diverse zones including the Dinosaur exclusive zone
Enjoy rides, rollercoasters, and other attractions themed around your favorite cartoon characters and superheroes

title: Ferrari World Abu Dhabi
meta: Ferrari World Abu Dhabi is a mostly indoors theme park located on Yas Island in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. It is the world's first Ferrari-themed park and...
description:
Ferrari World Abu Dhabi is a mostly indoors theme park located on Yas Island in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. It is the world's first Ferrari-themed park and is the home of Formula Rossa, which has held the record for the world’s fastest roller coaster.
Love speed? Then gear up for the ride of your life only here at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi. Home to the world's fastest rollercoaster, the highest loop ride, the tallest space-frame structure ever built on the planet and over 40 record-breaking attractions, this is the ultimate destination for non-stop, hyper-adrenaline, heart-racing fun!
Enjoy unlimited all-day access to all rides and experiences.

title: Polaris Buggy 4 Seater 1000 CC
meta: Our 4-seater Polaris RZR XP4 buggy is a powerful off-road vehicle designed for group exploration. With a robust engine, sturdy build, and advanced suspension, i...
description:
Our 4-seater Polaris RZR XP4 buggy is a powerful off-road vehicle designed for group exploration. With a robust engine, sturdy build, and advanced suspension, it’s well-equipped to handle the challenging terrain of Dubai’s desert. Each seat ensures a comfortable ride, making it perfect for families and friend groups.
Get ready for an unforgettable off-road escapade in the heart of Dubai’s desert with our 4-seater Polaris RZR XP4 buggy tour. Tailored for groups of friends, families, and adventure seekers, this tour promises thrills, stunning scenery, and shared memories.
includes: Free Pick and Drop facility with AC Vehicle
Self- Drive Dune Buggy options from 30 minutes to 2 Hours

title: Polaris Buggy 2 Seater 1000 CC
meta: Our Polaris buggy tours are perfect for adventure enthusiasts who are looking for an off-road experience like no other. With our Polaris buggy ride Dubai,...
description:
Our Polaris buggy tours are perfect for adventure enthusiasts who are looking for an off-road experience like no other. With our Polaris buggy ride Dubai, you can explore the desert dunes and get your adrenaline pumping as you conquer the challenging terrain.
Our Polaris buggy tours are led by experienced and professional guides who will take you on a journey through the desert, pointing out the stunning landscapes and sharing interesting facts about the local culture and history. Our guides are also trained to ensure your safety throughout the tour, so you can focus on enjoying the ride.
includes: Free Pick and Drop facility with AC Vehicle
Self- Drive Dune Buggy options from 30 minutes to 2 Hours

title: Helicopter Transfers Dubai - Abu Dhabi
meta:
Luxury & Speed Combined 
Experience the ultimate in luxury and convenience with Helicopter Transfers from Dubai to Abu Dhabi. Say goodbye to long road...
description:
Luxury & Speed Combined 
Experience the ultimate in luxury and convenience with Helicopter Transfers from Dubai to Abu Dhabi. Say goodbye to long road trips and traffic—our premium helicopter service offers a fast, comfortable, and exclusive way to travel between these two iconic cities.
Why Choose Our Helicopter Transfers?
-Fast & Time-Saving – Reach Abu Dhabi from Dubai in just 30 minutes!
-Luxury & Comfort – Enjoy a VIP experience with breathtaking aerial views.
-Private & Exclusive – Choose a private flight for the ultimate personalized journey.
-Scenic Views – Fly over Palm Jumeirah, Burj Khalifa, Yas Island, and more.
Perfect for Business & Leisure
Whether you’re a business executive with a tight schedule or a traveler looking for a once-in-a-lifetime experience, our helicopter transfers offer the perfect blend of speed, style, and comfort.
Book Your Helicopter Transfer Today!
Enjoy a seamless and hassle-free journey between Dubai and Abu Dhabi.

title: Full Day Abu Dhabi City Tour With Ferrari Wolrd
meta: Embark on an extraordinary Abu Dhabi City Tour with Ferrari World and experience the perfect blend of grandeur, spirituality, and adventure. This thrilling Abu...
description:
Embark on an extraordinary Abu Dhabi City Tour with Ferrari World and experience the perfect blend of grandeur, spirituality, and adventure. This thrilling Abu Dhabi tour from Dubai takes you through the UAE’s capital city, where breathtaking landmarks, cultural wonders, and high-speed excitement await.
Your journey begins with a scenic drive from Dubai to Abu Dhabi, where you’ll visit the majestic Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque—a true masterpiece of Islamic architecture with intricate domes, marble courtyards, and stunning chandeliers. As you continue through Al Bateen’s royal palaces, you’ll witness the elegance of Abu Dhabi’s aristocratic heritage before immersing yourself in art and culture at the Islamic Art Gallery.
Capture stunning views at the Corniche, Breakwater, and the opulent Emirates Palace, where we’ll make a photo stop to admire Abu Dhabi’s waterfront skyline. Your adventure continues with a visit to the BAPS Hindu Mandir, showcasing the city’s diverse cultural landscape.
The highlight of this Abu Dhabi tour with Ferrari World tickets included is the exhilarating visit to Ferrari World Abu Dhabi, home to Formula Rossa, the world’s fastest roller coaster, and a variety of adrenaline-pumping rides and immersive attractions. Whether you’re a thrill-seeker or a motorsport enthusiast, Ferrari World offers an unforgettable experience filled with speed, entertainment, and family-friendly fun.
As the day comes to an end, relax on your comfortable return drive to Dubai, reminiscing about the awe-inspiring sights and heart-racing adventures. With hotel transfers included, this all-inclusive Abu Dhabi sightseeing tour ensures a hassle-free experience from start to finish.
Whether you’re searching for a Dubai to Abu Dhabi day trip, an adventure-packed Ferrari World Tour, or an unforgettable cultural experience, this Abu Dhabi tour package offers the best of both worlds. Don’t miss out on discovering Abu Dhabi’s must-visit attractions and thrilling entertainment—book your tour today!
Abu Dhabi City Tour With Ferrari World Important Information



The timings for sharing transfers may vary, depending on traffic conditions and your location.
Please maintain the dress code for visiting attractions with cultural importance like Mosques, museums etc.
Transfers are only provided from centrally located hotels and residences in Dubai city. (Deira, Bur Dubai, Sheikh Zayed, Marina and other nearby locations)
Please adhere to moderate dressing as the trip includes visit to the Grand Mosque click here to know more
All personal expenses spent for lunch, shopping, drinks, dining etc. on-site during the tour will be borne by the guest.
Avoid taking pictures of people without their permission, especially in more conservative areas.
Ensure that you dress modestly, covering shoulders and knees, when visiting religious sites and public spaces.
Our terms and conditions prohibit eating, drinking, and smoking inside the vehicle during any tour that includes transfer services.
includes: Transfer to Tour Departure Point from your hotel
Visit to BAPS Mandir (Closed on Mondays)
Visit to the Sheikh Zayed Mosque
Ticket to Ferrari World Abu Dhabi – Visit
Return to Dubai and drop off to your location

title: Helicopter Ride 25 Minutes
meta: Take your adventure to new heights with a Helicopter Ride over Dubai's most iconic landmarks. Soar above the city for a bird’s-eye view of world-famous at...
description: Take your adventure to new heights with a Helicopter Ride over Dubai's most iconic landmarks. Soar above the city for a bird’s-eye view of world-famous attractions such as the Burj Khalifa, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Marina, and the Burj Al Arab. This exhilarating experience offers a unique perspective of Dubai’s stunning skyline and architectural marvels, creating unforgettable memories. Ideal for thrill-seekers, couples, and photographers, the Helicopter Ride is a must-try adventure to truly appreciate the grandeur of Dubai from above.

title: Exotic Sunrise Hot Air Balloon With Breakfast
meta: Soar high above the desert landscape with a Hot Air Balloon ride, offering a serene and breathtaking view of Dubai’s vast dunes and rugged mountains. As y...
description:
Soar high above the desert landscape with a Hot Air Balloon ride, offering a serene and breathtaking view of Dubai’s vast dunes and rugged mountains. As you float gently through the sky, you’ll witness the desert’s beauty at sunrise, with the golden sands stretching as far as the eye can see. This peaceful, awe-inspiring experience provides the perfect opportunity for photographers and adventurers alike to capture the beauty of the Arabian Desert from a unique vantage point. It’s an unforgettable journey, ideal for those seeking tranquility and adventure combined.
It’s time to fly! Following our staff's instructions, you get safely tucked into the basket and the ascend starts. The journey to 4000 feet in the air is peaceful and exhilarating at the same time. You have to actually be there to feel it, words won’t do any justice. After enjoying your adventure balloon ride the balloons land somewhere different in the desert every day depending on the wind. After landing, watch the ground crew professionally roll up the balloon envelope.
Of course, after the adventure, your appetite works up so Gourmet Breakfast in a Traditional Bedouin Camp is ready, We will give you a commemorative certificate of your flight so you can brag in front of your friends! Show off your bravado and encourage your friends and family to try the once in a lifetime experience with Air Balloon. After Enjoying the activities, our SUV’s drivers will get you back to your designated location/ hotels.
Take a break from the city’s usual sights and mundane activities with this hot air balloon Dubai package. From the hotel transfers and all safety briefings to a one-hour hot air balloon ride, every element of this tour is immaculately taken care of to ensure you a hassle-free experience. Whether you want to celebrate special occasions or simply wish to try an exotic activity, it promises an unforgettable aerial adventure in Dubai.
Arrive Early and Be Part of the Preps
You will arrive at the launch site before dawn and then head to the Majlis area to be welcomed with dates, gahwa, tea, and coffee. Watch a safety video and also listen to the instructions from our expert crew. After this, you will be taken to the launch site, where you can join the team for the flight preparation activities. Once the colorful balloon is unfurled and the basket is ready, it is time to take off!
Be Enveloped by the Stunning Desert Views
The magical ride takes you to over 4,000 feet in the sky. Glide like a mighty bird as you see the unparalleled sand dunes spread beneath your feet for as long as your eyes can take. Be in awe at the breathtaking desert sunrise views and enjoy the 360-degree views of the seas of golden sand as well as its astonishing flora and fauna on your approximately one-hour balloon flight.
Safe Descent and Flight Certificate
Following the flight, you will make a safe landing. Before the tour ends, you will receive a flight certificate signed by your friendly pilot. Apart from these, you can take home optional pictures and videos of your once-in-a-lifetime aerial adventure.
Passengers must be at least 5 years old to join the flight. While the approximate pick-up time is between 3 AM and 5 AM, the exact timing depends on the sunrise of the month and will be provided the evening before your experience.
Magical Morning With Balloon Flights Important Information

Guests must carry a valid ID proof or passport. Passengers without a valid ID will not be allowed to fly.
The waiver form must be filled out and submitted online 24 hours before the flight. Please complete the wavier form and upload a copy of your passport in image format only. Access the form at https://raynawaiver.raynab2b.com/.
The guest’s valid WhatsApp number is mandatory for reservations, allowing us to communicate the pickup time and provide any updates regarding the tour.
The Balloon Flights team will share the exact pickup time the day before the tour, between 7:00 PM and 8:30 PM.
Be ready at the pickup location at least 10 minutes before the scheduled time, as any delay could result in the cancellation of the entire flight.
The pick-up and drop-off times for shared transfers can be modified by 30 to 60 minutes, depending on traffic conditions and your location.
Children under five years old and individuals over 80 years old will not be permitted to fly.
The maximum weight limit is  119 kg. Guests exceeding this limit require pilot approval and will incur an extra charge.
Pregnant ladies will not be allowed to fly.
A 100% NO SHOW fee applies if a guest cancels the tour at the last moment. No alternate tour will be arranged, and no refund will be provided.
All participants must be in good physical condition and able to climb in and out of the basket and bend in a brace position during landing. The company does not accept responsibility for any adverse health conditions, as guests participate at their own risk.
Guests with disabilities, including mental health, emotional, and physical conditions, are not allowed to participate.
Guests are not allowed to carry heavy luggage during the activity.
Anyone under the influence of alcohol or any other drugs is strictly prohibited from flying.
Comfortable, casual clothing is recommended for this activity. Be sure to avoid high heels and wear comfy shoes or boots instead.
This activity is not recommended for individuals with heart conditions, serious knee problems, back issues, those who have undergone major surgery in the past six months, or anyone with a fear of heights.
Balloon flights are subject to weather conditions. The pilot has full authority to decide whether to proceed with or cancel the flight, prioritizing guest safety and following flying guidelines. If the flight is canceled due to bad weather, guests will be offered the next available tour date or a full refund.


Location Address: Balloon flight operation facility, Skydive Desert Drop Zone –Dubai  https://maps.app.goo.gl/43TkJTXio3VTtvqE9
includes: Flight Certificate signed by the pilot

title: Desert Safari Dubai VIP
meta: Embark on the ultimate Desert Safari in Dubai, where thrilling adventures, rich cultural experiences, and the majestic Arabian dunes await. Whether you seek hea...
description:
Embark on the ultimate Desert Safari in Dubai, where thrilling adventures, rich cultural experiences, and the majestic Arabian dunes await. Whether you seek heart-pounding action or relaxing Bedouin traditions, this Dubai desert tour has something for everyone.
Feel the rush of dune bashing in a 4X4 Land Cruiser, as you glide over golden dunes in a breathtaking off-road adventure. Dare to try sandboarding, ride powerful quad bikes and dune buggies, or take in panoramic desert views on a camel ride, just as Bedouins once did.
Step into a traditional Bedouin-style campsite, where the magic of the desert comes to life. Enjoy flavored shisha, sip on authentic Arabic coffee, and get a beautiful henna tattoo. Try on traditional Emirati attire for unforgettable photos and witness mesmerizing Tanoura dance and belly dance performances under the starlit sky.
Savor a sumptuous buffet dinner, featuring an array of grilled meats, fresh salads, traditional desserts, and refreshing drinks. Whether you choose a Normal or VIP Desert Safari, every moment is designed to offer an exceptional experience.
Watch the sunset over the endless dunes, creating a magical backdrop for incredible photos. As the night falls, soak in the serene beauty of the Arabian desert, making this Dubai desert safari tour an experience you’ll never forget.
Perfect for families, couples, and thrill-seekers alike, this top-rated Dubai excursion blends adventure, culture, and luxury into one unforgettable journey. Book your Dubai Desert Safari today and experience the real essence of the UAE’s desert wilderness!
Important Information
 



Shared transfers are provided from centrally located hotels and residences in Dubai city.
Please note that the child aged below 16 years will not be allowed for shisha and dune buggy experience .
The infants will NOT be allowed for dune bashing and need to be accompanied by a guardian at all times.
Pregnant women or people suffering from backache are not recommended for this Tour.
There will be no refund for partly utilized services.
No heavy luggage is allowed to be carried during this activity
Butler service is assigned per table accommodating max 6 guests .
Our terms and conditions prohibit eating, drinking, and smoking inside the vehicle during any tour that includes transfer services.
includes: Pick & Drop from/to the hotel or Residence in Luxury 4x4 Vehicles
Buggy Stop for Optional Buggy/Quad Bike rides (Depending on Tour Type Selection)
Dune Bashing (20 – 30 minutes) (Depending on Tour Type Selection)
Photo Stop (Depending on Tour Type Selection)
Access to Premium Zone – Sofa Seating
Table Service for Starters, Drinks, Tea, Co ee & Desserts
Self Service for Premium Dinner Buffet

title: Desert Safari Dubai Deluxe
meta: Experience the ultimate Desert Safari, where adventure and culture meet the majestic Arabian dunes. Premium camp to tailor your journey. Thrill-seekers can...
description:
Experience the ultimate Desert Safari, where adventure and culture meet the majestic Arabian dunes. Premium camp to tailor your journey. Thrill-seekers can enjoy heart-pounding activities like buggy rides and quad biking, along with dune bashing and sandboarding. Immerse yourself in Bedouin traditions at the camp, featuring camel rides, henna art, traditional performances, and a delectable BBQ dinner. Whether you crave adventure or cultural relaxation, this desert escape promises unforgettable memories beneath the starlit desert sky.
Book Premium Desert Safari and take the advantage of our thrilling Arabian desert adventure along with the other desert activities and entertainment. Ideal for people who are looking for an adventure, the desert safari offers you a dune bashing opportunities in the desert of Dubai. With a 4 x 4 vehicle, this journey is safe and at the same time exhilarating too.Once you reach the desert camp, you can indulge in a variety of activities including camel riding, quad biking, shisha smoking, etc. You can also don the traditional Arabic clothes and click pictures. While all these activities are fun, do not forget the sunset as the desert looks the best during this time of the day. As the sun sets and the night sets in, the desert camp becomes colourful and lovely. You can hear the melodious Arabic music and see the graceful belly dancing. We also conduct Tanura dance shows for our guests. Followed by this is a barbecue dinner which is a lavish spread of Arabic and international cuisine.
Premium Desert Safari Highlights


Experience high level of personalized services on this desert safari.
It’s particularly great for our guests looking for utmost privacy and comforts in their desert adventure.
Feel the thrill of a lifetime with an electrifying dune bash over colossal desert sands.
Take in desert sunset views and enjoy more cultural activities such as camel ride, henna tattooing, Shisha smoking etc.
Savor a lavish BBQ dinner complete with both vegetarian and non-vegetarian dishes.
Watch traditional Arabic performances including Belly Dance and Tanura show.

Premium Desert Safari Important Information

Please note that the child below 16 can enjoy the desert safari only and will be charged accordingly (NOT allowed for Shisha or Dune buggy)
The infants will NOT be allowed for dune bashing and need to be accompanied by a guardian at all times
If the location is far off from SIC pick-up points our operations team will coordinate with you to suggest a standard meeting point
Transfers (if selected)
Pregnant women or people suffering from backache are not recommended for this Tour
There will be no refund for partly utilized services
No heavy luggage is allowed to be carried during this activity
Our terms and conditions prohibit eating, drinking, and smoking inside the vehicle during any tour that includes transfer services.
includes: Exploration of dunes in a 4x4 vehicle approx 25-30 Minutes.
Live Cooking stations and relaxed sitting area. Premium Category.
Traditional BBQ dinner with vegetarian and non-vegetarian cuisines (At reserved area).
Shisha smoking facility at the shisha corner

Take a break from the city’s usual sights and mundane activities with this hot air balloon Dubai package. From the hotel transfers and all safety briefings to a one-hour hot air balloon ride, every element of this tour is immaculately taken care of to ensure you a hassle-free experience. Whether you want to celebrate special occasions or simply wish to try an exotic activity, it promises an unforgettable aerial adventure in Dubai.
Arrive Early and Be Part of the Preps
You will arrive at the launch site before dawn and then head to the Majlis area to be welcomed with dates, gahwa, tea, and coffee. Watch a safety video and also listen to the instructions from our expert crew. After this, you will be taken to the launch site, where you can join the team for the flight preparation activities. Once the colorful balloon is unfurled and the basket is ready, it is time to take off!
Be Enveloped by the Stunning Desert Views
The magical ride takes you to over 4,000 feet in the sky. Glide like a mighty bird as you see the unparalleled sand dunes spread beneath your feet for as long as your eyes can take. Be in awe at the breathtaking desert sunrise views and enjoy the 360-degree views of the seas of golden sand as well as its astonishing flora and fauna on your approximately one-hour balloon flight.
Safe Descent and Flight Certificate
Following the flight, you will make a safe landing. Before the tour ends, you will receive a flight certificate signed by your friendly pilot. Apart from these, you can take home optional pictures and videos of your once-in-a-lifetime aerial adventure.
Passengers must be at least 5 years old to join the flight. While the approximate pick-up time is between 3 AM and 5 AM, the exact timing depends on the sunrise of the month and will be provided the evening before your experience.
Magical Morning With Balloon Flights Important Information

Guests must carry a valid ID proof or passport. Passengers without a valid ID will not be allowed to fly.
The waiver form must be filled out and submitted online 24 hours before the flight. Please complete the wavier form and upload a copy of your passport in image format only. Access the form at https://raynawaiver.raynab2b.com/.
The guest’s valid WhatsApp number is mandatory for reservations, allowing us to communicate the pickup time and provide any updates regarding the tour.
The Balloon Flights team will share the exact pickup time the day before the tour, between 7:00 PM and 8:30 PM.
Be ready at the pickup location at least 10 minutes before the scheduled time, as any delay could result in the cancellation of the entire flight.
The pick-up and drop-off times for shared transfers can be modified by 30 to 60 minutes, depending on traffic conditions and your location.
Children under five years old and individuals over 80 years old will not be permitted to fly.
The maximum weight limit is  119 kg. Guests exceeding this limit require pilot approval and will incur an extra charge.
Pregnant ladies will not be allowed to fly.
A 100% NO SHOW fee applies if a guest cancels the tour at the last moment. No alternate tour will be arranged, and no refund will be provided.
All participants must be in good physical condition and able to climb in and out of the basket and bend in a brace position during landing. The company does not accept responsibility for any adverse health conditions, as guests participate at their own risk.
Guests with disabilities, including mental health, emotional, and physical conditions, are not allowed to participate.
Guests are not allowed to carry heavy luggage during the activity.
Anyone under the influence of alcohol or any other drugs is strictly prohibited from flying.
Comfortable, casual clothing is recommended for this activity. Be sure to avoid high heels and wear comfy shoes or boots instead.
This activity is not recommended for individuals with heart conditions, serious knee problems, back issues, those who have undergone major surgery in the past six months, or anyone with a fear of heights.
Balloon flights are subject to weather conditions. The pilot has full authority to decide whether to proceed with or cancel the flight, prioritizing guest safety and following flying guidelines. If the flight is canceled due to bad weather, guests will be offered the next available tour date or a full refund.


Location Address: Balloon flight operation facility, Skydive Desert Drop Zone –Dubai  https://maps.app.goo.gl/43TkJTXio3VTtvqE9
includes: Flight Certificate signed by the pilot

title: Desert Safari Dubai Standard
meta: Embark on the ultimate Desert Safari in Dubai, where thrilling adventures, rich cultural experiences, and the majestic Arabian dunes await. Whether you seek hea...
description:
Embark on the ultimate Desert Safari in Dubai, where thrilling adventures, rich cultural experiences, and the majestic Arabian dunes await. Whether you seek heart-pounding action or relaxing Bedouin traditions, this Dubai desert tour has something for everyone.
Feel the rush of dune bashing in a 4X4 Land Cruiser, as you glide over golden dunes in a breathtaking off-road adventure. Dare to try sandboarding, ride powerful quad bikes and dune buggies, or take in panoramic desert views on a camel ride, just as Bedouins once did.
Step into a traditional Bedouin-style campsite, where the magic of the desert comes to life. Enjoy flavored shisha, sip on authentic Arabic coffee, and get a beautiful henna tattoo. Try on traditional Emirati attire for unforgettable photos and witness mesmerizing Tanoura dance and belly dance performances under the starlit sky.
Savor a sumptuous buffet dinner, featuring an array of grilled meats, fresh salads, traditional desserts, and refreshing drinks. Whether you choose a Normal or VIP Desert Safari, every moment is designed to offer an exceptional experience.
Watch the sunset over the endless dunes, creating a magical backdrop for incredible photos. As the night falls, soak in the serene beauty of the Arabian desert, making this Dubai desert safari tour an experience you’ll never forget.
Perfect for families, couples, and thrill-seekers alike, this top-rated Dubai excursion blends adventure, culture, and luxury into one unforgettable journey. Book your Dubai Desert Safari today and experience the real essence of the UAE’s desert wilderness!
Important Information
 



Shared transfers are provided from centrally located hotels and residences in Dubai city.
Please note that the child aged below 16 years will not be allowed for shisha and dune buggy experience .
The infants will NOT be allowed for dune bashing and need to be accompanied by a guardian at all times.
Pregnant women or people suffering from backache are not recommended for this Tour.
There will be no refund for partly utilized services.
No heavy luggage is allowed to be carried during this activity
Butler service is assigned per table accommodating max 6 guests .
Our terms and conditions prohibit eating, drinking, and smoking inside the vehicle during any tour that includes transfer services.
includes: Unlimited refreshments (tea, coffee, water, soft drinks)
Sunset photography opportunity (Extra charges if pictures by a professional photographer)
Dune bashing in fully air-conditioned 4x4 Vehicle
BBQ dinner with vegetarian and non-vegetarian dishes
Live entertaining show of Belly dance
Shisha smoking facility at the shisha corner (Apple flavor)
Sufi dance show and Soft music

title: Full Day Abu Dhabi City Tour
meta: Embark on an unforgettable Abu Dhabi City Tour from Dubai, a must-experience journey that showcases the rich history, cultural heritage, and modern wonders of t...
description:
Embark on an unforgettable Abu Dhabi City Tour from Dubai, a must-experience journey that showcases the rich history, cultural heritage, and modern wonders of the United Arab Emirates’ capital. This immersive Abu Dhabi sightseeing tour takes you through its most iconic landmarks, from the breathtaking Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque—a stunning tribute to Islamic architecture—to the luxurious Emirates Palace, Qasr Al Watan, and the scenic Corniche.
Are you ready for an exciting Dubai to Abu Dhabi tour? With hassle-free transfers from Dubai, you’ll explore a city where tradition meets innovation, discovering diverse attractions that make Abu Dhabi a top tourist destination. Our carefully crafted Abu Dhabi tour package ensures you don’t miss out on must-visit sights, allowing you to soak in the grandeur of this vibrant metropolis.
One of the highlights of this tour is the Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, a mesmerizing white structure that stands as a symbol of faith, peace, and architectural brilliance. Named in honor of His Highness Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Al Nahyan, this landmark is a true testament to Abu Dhabi’s cultural legacy.
Whether you’re searching for an all-inclusive Abu Dhabi tour package from Dubai or simply want to explore an exotic destination, this tour offers the perfect mix of history, adventure, and luxury. Experience Abu Dhabi’s must-see attractions, discover its opulent lifestyle, and create unforgettable memories on this ultimate day trip from Dubai.
Abu Dhabi City Tour Highlights


This tour is the number one choice for those looking to visit Abu Dhabi from Dubai.
You don’t have to worry about the sights covered in your itinerary or how much time you’ll spend in a place. Every aspect of your tour is immaculately planned!
The tour comes with transportation means you just have to sit back and take in the sights.
You’ll visit the imposing Sheik Zayed Mosque, traditional Date Market, quaint Heritage Village, vibrant Corniche area, and the action-packed Yas Island, among others.
There will be Drive Through of the Emirates Palace Hotel, Ferrari World Abu Dhabi etc.

Abu Dhabi City Tour Important Information



Transfers are  provided from centrally located hotels and residences in Dubai city. (Deira, Bur Dubai, Sheikh Zayed, Marina and other nearby locations)
For private transfers, pick-up from Areas other than centrally located Dubai Hotels / Residence will be done on request with an additional charge.
Please adhere to moderate dressing as the trip includes visit to the Grand Mosque
Transfer timings may vary by 30 to 60 minutes, depending on traffic conditions and your location.
All personal expenses spent for lunch, shopping, drinks, dining etc. on-site during the tour will be borne by the guest.
Eating, drinking, and smoking in public spaces during daylight hours are restricted during Ramadan period.
Our terms and conditions prohibit eating, drinking, and smoking inside the vehicle during any tour that includes transfer services.
Note: In sharing transfers, the transfer timings may vary by 15-20 minutes depending on traffic conditions.
includes: Transfer to Tour Departure Point from your hotel

title: Full Day Dubai City Tour
meta: Discover the best of Dubai on a full-day sightseeing tour, where adventure, culture, and luxury come together in an unforgettable journey. E...
description:
Discover the best of Dubai on a full-day sightseeing tour, where adventure, culture, and luxury come together in an unforgettable journey. Explore the city’s top attractions, from world-famous skyscrapers to historic districts, luxury shopping destinations, and cultural landmarks. Whether you’re a first-time visitor or a seasoned traveler, this Dubai city tour ensures you experience the vibrant essence of the UAE’s most dynamic metropolis.
Tour Highlights – Dubai’s Must-See Attractions
• Capture stunning views of the Dubai King’s official residence Zabeel Palace, an architectural masterpiece showcasing royal grandeur.
• Witness Dubai’s vision for the future at this cutting-edge innovation hub Museum of the Future, with a photo stop to admire its iconic structure.
• Marvel at panoramic views of Old Dubai and New Dubai at this architectural landmark Dubai Frame.
• Stroll through Dubai’s historic Al Fahidi district, where wind towers and traditional houses tell the story of Dubai’s past at Bastakiya & Dubai Museum.
• Board a traditional wooden Abra boat and cruise along Dubai Creek, offering a glimpse into the city’s trading history.
• Explore Dubai’s vibrant marketplaces, where you can shop for gold jewelry, exotic spices, and souvenirs at Gold & Spice Souks.
• Admire the architectural elegance of one of Dubai’s most famous mosques Jumeirah Mosque and its modern historical Etihad Museum.
• Capture breathtaking photos of Dubai’s ultra-luxurious, sail-shaped hotel, the Burj Al Arab.
• Enjoy a scenic Monorail ride to Atlantis, The Palm, one of Dubai’s most famous resorts on the man-made Palm Jumeirah island.
• Witness the skyscraper skyline of Dubai Marina and the twisting Cayan Tower.
• Visit one of the world’s largest shopping malls, walk through the Dubai Aquarium, and take in the stunning indoor waterfall at Dubai Mall & Burj Khalifa.
• End the day with the dazzling Dubai Fountain Show, set against the backdrop of the Burj Khalifa, with water, lights, and music in perfect harmony.
From the cultural heart of Old Dubai to the modern marvels of Downtown Dubai, this Dubai full-day city tour is the perfect way to explore the city’s iconic attractions. Enjoy convenient hotel transfers, expert-guided insights, and a seamless itinerary designed to showcase the very best of Dubai.
Book your Dubai city tour today and experience the magic of the UAE’s most dazzling metropolis!
WHAT TO EXPECT
Kick Off Your Dubai Tour in a Regal Setting
Your unforgettable Dubai one-day tour begins with a hotel pick-up and transfer to the first stop, the majestic Zabeel Palace, the official residence of HH Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum, Dubai’s ruler and the Prime Minister of the UAE.
As you arrive at this royal landmark, admire its breathtaking architecture, beautifully landscaped gardens, and iconic Arabian design. Capture stunning photos of this grand palace, which perfectly sets the tone for a day filled with luxury, culture, and exploration in the heart of Dubai.
Experience Dubai’s Most Modern Marvels
As your Dubai city tour unfolds, dive into the cutting-edge architecture and futuristic landmarks that define this dynamic metropolis. Your expert guide will provide fascinating insights into Dubai’s transformation, from a humble trading hub to a global icon of innovation and luxury.
Make unforgettable memories with photo stops at two of the city’s most groundbreaking attractions like the Museum of the Future and the Dubai Frame
Discover Dubai’s rich heritage as you explore Al Bastakiya Quarter, home to the city’s oldest neighborhoods. Wander through its narrow alleyways, where sand-colored buildings with traditional wind towers house art galleries, museums, and cultural spaces, offering a glimpse into Dubai’s past.
Experience Dubai’s true essence with a scenic ride on a traditional wooden abra, the city’s original mode of transport. As you glide across the historic Dubai Creek, take in the contrast between Old Dubai’s trading ports and the rising skyscrapers in the distance.
No visit to Old Dubai is complete without exploring its bustling souks (markets).
• At th Gold Souk you can witness a dazzling display of intricately crafted gold, silver, and diamond jewelry, and try your hand at bargaining for unique treasures.
• The Spice Souk engage your senses with the aromatic blend of exotic spices, herbs, and perfumes, an authentic taste of Dubai’s trading legacy.
This part of the Dubai city tour transports you to the city’s humble beginnings, offering a unique mix of history, culture, and traditional shopping—a must-experience for any traveler.
After immersing yourself in Dubai’s historic charm, take a well-deserved break at Mercato Mall, a shopping and dining destination inspired by Renaissance-era Italian architecture. Enjoy a delicious meal at one of the international or local restaurants, or browse its boutique stores for unique finds.
Next, visit Farooq Omar Bin Khatib Mosque, an architectural marvel that blends Ottoman and Andalusian influences. Known for its elegant domes, intricate calligraphy, and serene ambiance, this mosque is dedicated to promoting Islamic values, cultural understanding, and harmony.
The journey continues with a photo stop at Burj Al Arab, one of Dubai’s most iconic landmarks. This luxurious sail-shaped hotel, set against the backdrop of the Arabian Gulf, is a true symbol of Dubai’s opulence and innovation. Don’t miss the chance to snap the perfect picture of this world-famous architectural masterpiece.
This part of the Dubai city tour offers a seamless transition from historic exploration to modern sophistication, providing a well-rounded experience of the city’s diverse landscape.
Get ready for a breathtaking journey aboard the Palm Monorail, offering panoramic views of the Arabian Gulf and Dubai’s skyline. As you glide across the world-famous Palm Jumeirah, soak in the sights of luxurious beachfront residences, high-end resorts, and turquoise waters.
Step off the monorail at Atlantis, The Palm, one of Dubai’s most iconic resorts. While here, you’ll have a chance to admire the grandeur of this ocean-themed paradise, catch a glimpse of the Aquaventure Waterpark, and experience the vibrant atmosphere of this world-class destination.
Your tour continues with a stop at Zabeel Saray Hotel, where you’ll capture unparalleled views of the JBR skyline. Then, marvel at the stunning Cayan Tower, known for its unique twisting design, before heading to Dubai Marina Walk & Yacht Club. Take in the sight of luxurious yachts, modern skyscrapers, and the shimmering waters of the marina, creating the perfect backdrop for unforgettable pictures.
This part of your Dubai sightseeing tour highlights the city’s ultramodern architecture, luxurious waterfront lifestyle, and engineering marvels, ensuring an experience like no other!
Conclude your one-day Dubai city tour in the heart of the city’s most glamorous district—Downtown Dubai. Here, you’ll be surrounded by record-breaking attractions, luxury shopping, and world-class entertainment.
Stand in awe before the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest tower, and take in its stunning architectural brilliance. You can opt for an At The Top experience, where an elevator ride whisks you to one of the highest observation decks for breathtaking panoramic views of Dubai.
Step into Dubai Mall, the largest shopping mall on the planet, offering over 1,200 retail outlets, luxury boutiques, and dining experiences. While here, don’t miss:
• The Dubai Mall Waterfalls – A stunning, Insta-worthy indoor waterfall with artistic sculptures.
• Dubai Aquarium & Underwater Zoo – Home to thousands of marine creatures, including sharks and stingrays, housed in a massive suspended tank.
As the grand finale, head outside to Burj Lake to witness the Dubai Fountain Show, the world’s largest choreographed fountain display. Watch in amazement as jets of water dance to global hits, illuminated by thousands of lights, creating a mesmerizing symphony of movement and sound.
After an action-packed day of culture, adventure, and luxury, you’ll be transported back to your hotel, reflecting on an unforgettable journey through Dubai’s most iconic landmarks.
This full-day Dubai sightseeing tour promises an immersive experience filled with architectural wonders, cultural gems, thrilling entertainment, and luxurious indulgence!
Full Day Explore Dubai City Tour Important Information

Please carry valid ID proof/Passport along with you.
Transfers are only provided from centrally located hotels and residences in Dubai city. (Deira, Bur Dubai, Sheikh Zayed, Marina and other nearby locations)
If the location is far off from SIC pick-up points our operations team will coordinate with you.
There will be no refund for partly utilized services.
No heavy luggage is allowed to be carried during this activity.
On specific days and weekends, some of the attractions might remain close for visits. In such cases, we do not hold any responsibility and no compensations will be adjusted.
The pick-up/drop-off timing on Sharing transfers can be modified as per the trip schedule by 30 to 60 minutes, depending on traffic conditions and your location.
Eating, drinking, and smoking in public spaces during daylight hours are restricted during this period.
Avoid taking pictures of people without their permission, especially in more conservative areas.
Ensure that you dress modestly, covering shoulders and knees, when visiting religious sites and public spaces.
Our terms and conditions prohibit eating, drinking, and smoking inside the vehicle during any tour that includes transfer services.
includes: Transfer to Tour Departure Point from your hotel
Museum of The Future – Information & Photo Stop
Visit to Bastakiya and one of the old houses
Visit to Spice Souq and Gold Souq
Visit Al Farooq Omar Bin Al Khattab Mosque
Burj Al Arab - Information & Photo Stop
Monorail Ride on Palm Jumeirah to Atlantis
JBR Skyline from Palm Jumeirah – Photo Stop
Dubai Marina Walk & Yacht club – Information & Photo Stop
Visit Dubai Mall and see Waterfalls, Dubai Aquarium Glass Window, Dubai Fountain Show

title: Half Day Dubai City Tour
meta: Discover the best of Dubai with a captivating half-day tour. Explore iconic landmarks like the Burj Al Arab, Jumeirah Mosque, and the bustling Gold and Spice So...
description:
Discover the best of Dubai with a captivating half-day tour. Explore iconic landmarks like the Burj Al Arab, Jumeirah Mosque, and the bustling Gold and Spice Souks. Enjoy scenic views of the Dubai Marina and Palm Jumeirah, and immerse yourself in the city's rich culture at the Dubai Museum. Perfect for experiencing Dubai's highlights in just a few hours!
Begin your tour at the iconic Zabeel Palace for a quick photo stop to capture its architectural marvel. Move on to the renowned Dubai Frame for timeless snapshots. Explore the charming Bastakiya neighborhood, delving into the history of Dubai through traditional architecture and alleyways. Board an Abra at the Abra Station for a delightful ride on Dubai Creek. Continue to the Islamic Art Centre and admire the sail-shaped structure during a brief photo stop. Drive through the enchanting Al Qasr and capture its Arabian charm. Head to The Pointe for a 15-minute photo stop with views of Atlantis The Palm. Finally, conclude your adventure at Dubai Mall, surrounded by the wonders of the city. Return to your hotel with cherished memories of Dubai's culture, landmarks, and beauty.
Let our fully guided classical Dubai city tour take you through the city’s unrivaled new and charismatic old sights. Starting with the regal majesty of Zabeel Palace, this half-day Dubai city tour journeys you to the past, treats you with the most imposing Dubai views, and lets you indulge in the most incredible experiences like an abra ride along the Dubai Creek.
WHAT TO EXPECT
A Journey through Old and New
You can look forward to a captivating expedition that unravels the spellbinding blend of old and new in Dubai on this all-inclusive, guided Dubai half-day city tour. The brilliant fusion of classic and classy attractions guarantees an immersive experience that showcases the fascinating evolution of the city. The first stop on your half-day tour in Dubai allows you to witness the splendor of Zabeel Palace, the ruling family’s residence, before you head to capture the perfect snapshot of Dubai’s architectural gems, such as the Dubai Frame.
Go on an Abra Ride & Explore Old Dubai’s Timeless Charm
As the next part of the half-day city tour Dubai takes you to the city’s old parts, you can set sail on an atmospheric abra ride, navigating the legendary Dubai Creek’s water. Experience the unpretentious beauty and simplicity of a bygone era at the Al Fahidi Historical Neighborhood (also known as Al Bastakiya Quarter) and further lose yourself in the compelling atmosphere of the Gold Souk and Spice Souk, where its narrow alleys and vivacious retail outlets offer a sensory delight of aromas, sights, and sounds.
Witness Up-Close Artistic Wonders and Iconic Landmarks
As your Dubai city half-day tour progresses, transport yourself to the world of Islamic art masterpieces at the Islamic Art Centre. It is followed by soaking in the spectacular sights along the way, with photo ops at the enlightening Etihad Museum, the remarkable Jumeirah Mosque, and the energetic Pointe. You can also witness the unparalleled glory of Burj Al Arab, the palatial-like Al Qasr Hotel, and Atlantis, The Palm, set against the dazzling waters of the Arabian Gulf.
Dubai City Tour Important Information



Transfers are only provided from centrally located hotels and residences in Dubai city. (Deira, Bur Dubai, Sheikh Zayed, Marina and other nearby locations).
The pick-up/drop-off timing on Sharing transfers can be modified as per the trip schedule by 30 to 60 minutes, depending on traffic conditions and your location.
On specific days and weekends, some of the locations might remain close for visits. In such cases, we do not hold any responsibility and no compensations will be adjusted.
Avoid taking pictures of people without their permission, especially in more conservative areas.
Ensure that you dress modestly, covering shoulders and knees, when visiting religious sites and public spaces.
Our terms and conditions prohibit eating, drinking, and smoking inside the vehicle during any tour that includes transfer services.
